title: galium helveticum var. cenisium
intro: Galium helveticum var. cenisium, also known as Alpine Bedstraw, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its small, white or pinkish flowers and erect stems. Traditionally, Alpine Bedstraw has been used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Alpine Bedstraw can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in a variety of ways.
